channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: How to Make Product Ads With AI for TikTok and YouTube—For (Almost) Free
item.description: One product photo, three AI tools, and about 20 minutes: Here's the full workflow for generating a sales video without a camera, a model, or a studio.

item.title: Say hello to Robinhood Chain mainnet, the blockchain built specifically for financial services and tokenized real-world assets. 📺 x.com/i/broadcasts/1… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE85cmVqdFlaU3hQTG9ocGNMcG1zTXp5cFhaaFd2VnZ3a3BKXzRXaEJBNFJraE45anBNb2N6SVgwaGM1eTg1bHR2LUdlRHFjdEpyWTJDX3BoaC1MdU8xTlRDM2VfMA?oc=5" target="_blank">Say hello to Robinhood Chain mai…

item.title: Stablecoin market cap has shrunk by $10 billion since May, but analyst sees no reason to panic
item.description: The market shrank by $7.7 billion in June alone, the largest dollar amount since May 2022's Terra-Luna crash, but stablecoins will likely resume their long-term growth, one analyst said.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at another Bitcoin announcement tomorrow 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFB1QXlGdzlPVVo4WGZ3elFCWldhM1VyUml2LWNXd1NBTlZoM2NzdTdEUGhkOGZXbkpxVFY5djh5UThmaExwMFZOQV9sXy1aLXJQZlFiOUdFc0E3ejZ3QlhjVmVHUk43djQ?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hin…

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "Orange dots tell only part of the story." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBrUGpSN1QxNXhfMHhqYzVCSy1tSFVTbndrQXNMWHkzVm5VNk1nVXZ5R3BLZVI3Wk0wdHVtNjY1MXQtYWptY1l5ODdaSlhiYmlQMEdnRUxGODdtclJyTXI2Skh3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: Pakistan crypto chief seeks dialogue after scholar rules against crypto payments
item.description: Pakistan’s virtual-assets regulator called for continued dialogue on the treatment of digital assets after meeting an Islamic scholar who backed a ruling against purchases made with crypto.

item.title: Bitcoin is nearing a power law support line Fidelity has tracked since 2015
item.description: The group's Dir. of Global Macro Jurien Timmer calls it an accumulation zone but notes the lack of a catalyst to bounce yet.

item.title: Bitcoin is an emergent network of wallets weighted by satoshis, nodes weighted by commerce, and miners weighted by hashrate, with capital, consensus, and security held in dynamic equilibrium. $BTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBkMHhNZXNVQ0xjZFF3eTJtZ1NWWkhRTmRXT09tS0xkMmhNa182M1JrN21TNjZrVXNMT3FsR2xTc1h3TF8xWjBtMkRMMkRGM0N4YW5vWTcxdy1WSGc?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin is an emergent network of wallets w…

item.title: BlackRock’s BUIDL Tops $900M on Avalanche, Doubles in a Week According to RWA xyz, BlackRock’s tokenized money market fund BUIDL has surpassed $900 million in assets under management (AUM) on the Avalanche network, increasing by approxima - x.com

item.title: Cambridge study puts Ethereum near the lower end of PoS energy intensity
item.description: Cambridge estimated that Ethereum consumes 7.87 GWh annually and has the second-lowest market-value-adjusted energy intensity among the proof-of-stake networks studied.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether little changed as U.S. launches fresh Iran strikes
item.description: The U.S. hit Iran for the third time this week and Tehran has reportedly closed the Strait of Hormuz again.

item.title: Ripple once weighed shutting down and handing XRP to shareholders, CEO says
item.description: Ripple's Brad Garlinghouse says he and co-founder Chris Larsen considered winding the company down and handing its XRP to shareholders before deciding to fight the 2020 lawsuit.

item.title: Bitcoin’s BIP 110 fork deadline nears with miner support at zero
item.description: The BIP 110 proposal would cap arbitrary data on Bitcoin for a year, but Saylor, Adam Back and others say turning a spam dispute into a consensus fight could create a bigger risk than the spam itself.

item.title: Bitcoin bulls Michael Saylor, Adam Back slam BIP-110 Ordinals proposal
item.description: The ongoing debate over a proposed temporary fork comes despite a broad downturn in Ordinals transaction activity over the last two years.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Ripple CEO Says Company Considered Shutting Down After 2020 SEC Lawsuit Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse said the company seriously considered shutting down after the U.S. SEC sued it in 2020. He said Ripple could have distributed its XRP holdings t - x.com

item.title: Empery Digital shares rise after selling BTC to fund AI data center project
item.description: The sales come months after a major Empery shareholder demanded the firm ditch its Bitcoin treasury strategy and sought the resignation of its CEO and board.

item.title: JUST IN: Eric Trump says "ETH is pumping hard…Crypto is the future." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5Zc0VHamtCSmxBNGs1QkdPTWIwOUota2RQbFAza3VkRzFZeXlSOV81V1kxTEt3SElRMHNPYzBjb0RiUlR4ZFJaa3M5TkQwOTJOZHBmSHMxcHJjNF8xYUc4aWNn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Eric Trump says "ETH is p…

item.title: Lending protocol Bonzo loses 77% of value locked as $9 million oracle exploit rattles Hedera
item.description: Bonzo Lend lost approximately $9.05 million after an attacker exploited a verification flaw in a third-party Supra oracle contract on the Hedera network.

item.title: JUST IN: Fidelity's 'Bitcoin's Support & Resistance' data shows BTC in an accumulation zone and "getting ever closer to its power law support line" 👀 Buy the dip 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9ZelFpR1hKTkc3X3FJc2lqSTNHNllZVW5tYXpZcUZldmpVZVE2d2tSTVMycDlTNkprVXhRdDNVekU5VkNodlhUVXl3WlpPMWZhaGlzVXhCUUtvUDdoclFGV1hFTTlkRDQ?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Fidelity's 'Bitcoi…

item.title: 🚨JUST IN: AI FOUND A BUG THAT COULD CRASH ETHEREUM VALIDATORS Ethereum Foundation developers used AI agents to hunt for flaws and uncovered a remotely triggerable crash in the network's messaging system. It has since been fixed. Most of t - x.com

item.title: Crypto IPO market stalls as capital rotates to AI and macro uncertainty weighs
item.description: Funding constraints and investor caution, not regulation, are delaying crypto IPOs, according to Cohen & Company Capital Markets' Christian Lopez.

item.title: There are 110 things more dangerous to Bitcoin than spam. BIP 110 turns a spam dispute into a consensus change that would invalidate some currently valid, fee-paying transactions. That precedent is the danger. We should save our energy for threats that re - x.com

item.title: What Is Robinhood Chain? The Ethereum Layer-2 Network for Tokenized Stocks
item.description: Robinhood Chain is an Ethereum layer-2 network built with Arbitrum technology for tokenized assets, crypto apps, and on-chain financial products.

item.title: The UK has finally shown it’s serious about crypto
item.description: Several recent regulatory steps indicate the UK might finally stop dragging its feet when it comes to crypto, argues Wirex CEO Chet Shah.

item.title: JUST IN: Crypto prediction platform Polymarket officially launches combo trading. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE10aV82a25WNVZRaUNsTklZbm02bzBqUXFuQ1l4V3EzUnBLa01kNHk4RTFrS1BuRE9rbk9EaWJMeW1pLUhscTJuYjBpNWgyT09TTG9MSmFRc2tSQlF4UVZNVERB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Crypto prediction platfor…

item.title: The bullish divergence on #Bitcoin is one of the strongest signals that the markets are about to reverse. The reason that we're not seeing much more momentum is the fact that Bitcoin hasn't been breaking into its range. Breaking $65,000 for #Bitcoin would seal - x.com

item.title: MORGAN STANLEY IS BUYING BITCOIN Morgan Stanley bought $13.2M of Bitcoin this week. They have not sold Bitcoin since May. Will they keep buying for the rest of this month? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1lNnpWX0lsRXo3UFJfdnZoX1YxdXRMbUcyNlZWRGZxbVJlSjlzQ0x1QzlfSWZSai11ZEtuNWdPN3d5X0FDT0F3bmExMUg2UDY4QjlkeENhNE9PcHc?oc=5" target="_blank">MORGAN STANLEY IS BUYING BITCOIN Morgan Sta…

item.title: Bitcoin nearing late stages of bear market: Jamie Coutts, Real Vision
item.description: Real Vision chief crypto analyst Jamie Coutts said it's far too early to call $1 million by 2030, but he's confident Bitcoin could climb up to $250,000 over the next couple of years.

item.title: Nano Banana 2 Lite vs. Nano Banana 2: When to Save Your Money and When to Upgrade
item.description: Google's cheapest, fastest image model is a genuinely capable tool—until you need it to be great.

item.title: Ethereum climbs 3% on tokenization boom: Can bulls push ETH price past $1,800?
item.description: Despite strong tokenization gains and institutional accumulation, weak onchain and derivatives data leaves ETH vulnerable to a $1,700 retest.

item.title: Bitcoin treasury company Empery Digital sold about half of its BTC stack
item.description: It's a sign of the times as the troubled company swaps its bitcoin treasury ambitions for AI data centers.

item.title: AI found an Ethereum bug that could take validators offline, but humans had to prove it
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation pointed coordinated AI agents at the software its validators run and got a remotely triggerable crash out of it. It also got a pile of confident, well-written findings that were not bugs at all.

item.title: Bonzo Lend loses $9M in oracle exploit on Hedera
item.description: An attacker inflated the value of SAUCE collateral and borrowed $9 million from Bonzo Lend through a flaw in Supra’s onchain oracle verifier.

item.title: JUST IN: ETH bridged from @ethereum (L1) to Robinhood Chain (L2) is up by ~10x in the past week, surpassing $100 million. @RobinhoodCrypto Chain uses ETH as its native gas token. If adoption continues, the chain could become a meaningful new sourc - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1CTVJfSE9uVHRUVXFNRWpZakJFMUk0RXBMWHAwNjZMVXpyVEFseXN6NGg1Z1lIWDdRcF9ZcldtTlFCMks5ejh6X194aUFYZ0VRTTZId0FZR2poSEVBdzFPWGRkTi0?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: ETH bridged from @ethe…

item.title: Bitcoin price gains nearly 10% in July, but traders still see BTC copying 2022 bear market
item.description: Bitcoin price gains approached 10% for the first two weeks of the month, but analysis warned of the bear market returning from August onward.

item.title: Dollar stablecoins could improve FX access but amplify currency runs: IMF
item.description: An IMF working paper says US dollar stablecoins can improve access to foreign currency but may also help coordinate exits from local currencies during periods of severe exchange-rate stress.

item.title: Robinhood says its AI agent feature will ‘soon’ be assisting crypto traders
item.description: More than 70,000 agentic accounts have already been created by Robinhood equities and options traders since late May, when Robinhood launched a beta version of the product.

item.title: Bitcoin analysts predict $300,000–$500,000 price in 2029. The math says no
item.description: Analysts predict a rally to $300,000 or more by 2029. But key data suggests the era of moonshots may be over.

item.title: DOJ moves to dismiss charges against alleged $722M BitClub fraudster: Report
item.description: Matthew Goettsche was set to face trial in October for conspiracy to commit wire fraud and selling unregistered securities.

item.title: Apple Sues OpenAI, Claims Former Employees Stole Trade Secrets
item.description: Apple alleges former employees took confidential designs, supplier information, and engineering files before joining OpenAI.

item.title: Meta's Chief Data Officer Says Agentic Commerce is the "Next Tier of Business"
item.description: Alex Schultz says stablecoins are assumed inside Meta. The harder problem is getting the rest of the world there.

item.title: Kraken to overhaul app with AI investing assistant
item.description: The redesigned app will use AI to recommend trades and tailor investing tools around users' financial goals as Kraken expands into broader financial services.

item.title: Senate Democrats call for hearings into Trump’s ties to crypto amid CLARITY Act discussions
item.description: Five senators called for committee hearings to investigate US President Donald Trump’s policies potentially being influenced by crypto funding from United Arab Emirates-linked and other entities.

item.title: Democrats Call for Senate Hearings on Trump's Massive Crypto Profits
item.description: Top Democrats on key Senate committees demanded inquiries into the more than $1.2 billion that President Trump made on crypto last year.

item.title: Crypto is coming to agentic trading. Eligible US customers will soon be able to connect their AI agent to a dedicated Robinhood account to trade crypto on their behalf, with the same real-time P&L tracking and push notifications they already know from agentic t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBNSXFsSU5RNV8yd3dNaFlXaDZMeHdjZkVmTTB6SUVaUUpuelBCd1FTelV1emQ5V1NlZmZHa3c0M2JUV3lMMEZ2el84MDJZR0EtYjlZdzdodUhlSDhZTzNPRFpZaw?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto is coming to agentic trad…

item.title: US CBDC ban to go into effect without Trump signoff on housing bill
item.description: Donald Trump confirmed on social media that he would not sign the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which includes a ban on a US CBDC until the end of 2030, setting the stage for the bill to become law on Saturday.

item.title: Bitcoin Treasury Firm Empery Digital Dumps Nearly Half of BTC Holdings for $87 Million
item.description: Nasdaq-listed Empery Digital said it sold 1,400 Bitcoin since May to help fuel an AI data center deal, legal bills, and other expenses.

item.title: Tokenized equities are one of the clearest examples of blockchain adoption in financial markets today. Three models are emerging: ↳ Wrapper: Token wraps equity held in an SPV (Special Purpose Vehicle). 70%+ of tokenized stocks use this model today. ↳ E - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5GTUw2eWdveHVsdW1LWEx1NHdyNUFCdUgyWjcyNzJIUHNwTlpPRFBBRUJVUDdQVFRYbngxNGY3b216MWE3N192TEU0MFlyeU16S0puNUZLV1hWNll2UTcw?oc=5" target="_blank">Tokenized equities are one of the clea…

item.title: Xbox CEO Joins Fed AI Jobs Task Force Days After Announcing 3,200 Layoffs
item.description: Asha Sharma will advise the Federal Reserve on AI’s impact on jobs and productivity as Xbox undergoes the biggest restructuring in its history.

item.title: New Hampshire council votes down $100M Bitcoin bonds
item.description: State representative Keith Ammon said the New Hampshire executive council's vote against Bitcoin-backed bonds was “short-sighted,” urging the body to reconsider the measure.

item.title: Backpack joins race for 24/7 stock markets with tokenized equities
item.description: The launch comes as tokenized stocks become one of the fastest-growing corners of crypto, with exchanges and traditional finance firms racing to expand 24/7 trading.

item.title: U.S. government digital dollar set to be banned tonight under housing law's CBDC limit
item.description: Despite President Donald Trump's refusal to sign Congress' bipartisan housing bill, it's set to go into effect at midnight, and its temporary CBDC ban along with it.

item.title: Crypto Biz: How stablecoins found their niche
item.description: Stablecoins are carving out specialized roles as regulation reshapes the market, while Strategy’s Bitcoin sale and Vanguard’s tokenization push highlight crypto’s evolving financial landscape.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇯🇵 Japan's Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama on Bitcoin and crypto ETFs, "we would like to proceed with considerations toward legalizing cryptocurrency ETFs in Japan as well." 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5iTW52bFRPZ1Y1dE5hVUdHZ25ZelktSGoycG5UcEp6VmZTbG5JOFhMSW56OGV0SkRDZGoxdlc4azl3eW5GWFlQR0xZMVY0bmNsaENFbzVUaXljUWpGb3lsN0FQN1BxOUk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇯🇵 Japan's Finan…

item.title: Hyundai becomes first major South Korean company to introduce internal stablecoin transfers
item.description: The initiative builds on a broader shift by companies exploring stablecoins to move money between international operations more efficiently.

item.title: Trump Won't Sign Housing Bill With CBDC Ban—Will It Become Law Tonight Anyway?
item.description: Unless President Trump vetoes the bill, it will become law at midnight, banning the Federal Reserve from developing a CBDC until 2031.

item.title: Bitcoin whales sent BTC price to $64K as Coinbase Premium broke key level: CryptoQuant
item.description: Bitcoin price gains came thanks to US whales propeling the Coinbase Premium above a key trend line, new analysis from CryptoQuant reported.
